pages.text: Time Period: Late Cretaceous Period $(br2)Temperament: Hostile $(br2)Diet: Carnivorous $(br2)Preferred Habitats: Badlands, Jungles

The Carnotaurus is an extremely angry creature that will attack anything on sight. If pacified, the Carnotaurus will become neutral to players and most mobs, but will still attack monsters. Rarely, a Carnotaurus may be born with a different color pattern.
